title: Better Rabbits
description: A subtle but impactful anatomical correction for Minecraft's latest update. This pack moves the rabbit eyes from the front of the head to the sides.

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
A subtle but impactful anatomical correction for Minecraft's latest update. This pack moves the rabbit eyes from the front of the head to the sides

Features:

- Anatomical Accuracy: Repositions eyes to the sides of the head.
  
- 26.1 "Tiny Takeover" Ready: Fully compatible with the brand-new 3D models and UV mapping.
  
- All Variants Included: Applies to every breed, including baby versions and special skins like "Toast".
  
- Vanilla Friendly: Designed to blend perfectly with the original game textures.
